Video.summary: A woman accuses her long-distance boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Matthews vs. Bryant

Video.summary: After years of ups and downs, the result of a DNA test will make or break a long-distance relationship.
Video.title: Webb vs. Jackson

Video.summary: Kaitlynn claims her ex abused her while pregnant with his child and is here to sue him for over $4,000.
Video.title: Playing House Gone Wrong

Video.summary: After her boyfriend, Barry, takes a suspicious "business trip" to Miami, Brooke suspects him of cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Daniels vs. White

Video.summary: Emanuel has brought his former friend to court over a collections bill.
Video.title: Gone to Collections

Video.summary: Alisha is being sued by her step father, but says she owes him nothing after he put her in foster care.
Video.title: Coping with Family Chaos

Video.summary: Past infidelity has a girlfriend and boyfriend at odds over the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Ogletree vs. Lockhart

Video.summary: Sanela and Nic found their love is getting lost in the hustle and bustle of NYC and are seeking help from the Cutlers.
Video.title: Begani vs Crespo

Video.summary: Shaylen petitions her boyfriend, Quan, to take a polygraph test because she suspects he's cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Hudson

Video.summary: A grieving grandmother demands a paternity test to uncover the truth about her late son's mysterious child.
Video.title: Moultry vs. Portuonio

Video.summary: A blind rapper brings his wife to court with an ultimatum: to drop her maiden name and take his last name.
Video.title: Nelson vs. Crowe

Video.summary: A devastating revelation proves that love truly is blind in Sharise and Edson's relationship.
Video.title: Bowie vs. Segarra

Video.summary: Llewellyn Clark sues ex-girlfriend Tyronica Munn for $1,400, claiming she stole it after a fight. Tyronica says she spent it on a hotel, champagne, and a massage, asserting the money was owed since Llewellyn freeloaded in her apartment.
Video.title: Ex Spending Spree

Video.summary: Anastasia is a hair stylist here to sue one of her clients for an unpaid loan and emotional distress.
Video.title: Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan

Image.alt: Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan
Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan
Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan

Video.summary: Paulita is suing her baby daddy for the value of a car, saying she left him because he's an abusive drunk.
Video.title: Paying Up for the Car

Video.summary: An entertainer seeks help from the judges on how to deal with his girlfriend’s insecurity surrounding his line of work.
Video.title: Obiowo vs. Vranas

Video.summary: When the Cowans find they’re growing apart after 10 years of marriage, they come before the judges for help.
Video.title: Cowan vs Cowan

Video.summary: Secret social accounts and suspicious behavior have Kashmir asking the Cutlers if this relationship can be saved.
Video.title: Thornton vs Jones

Video.summary: Several stolen wigs and one wrecked car have a Mississippi couple standing before the judges.
Video.title: Merriweather vs. Kimmons

Video.summary: A rekindled love and broken trust collide as Larry evaluates his future with his ex-wife and their newborn son.
Video.title: Mayes vs. Lebron

Video.summary: Since the birth of their child, Canandas denies being the father, so Charisma demands he take a paternity test.
Video.title: Paige vs Ware

Video.summary: A man says his girlfriend's actions don't match her words, which makes him suspect that she's cheating on him.
Video.title: Jackson vs. King

Video.summary: A Georgia man questions if his girlfriend’s late night “work calls” mean she’s escorting again. A polygraph test will reveal all.
Video.title: Ubani vs. Green

Video.summary: Jail, bail, and a relationship gone stale. The Wallaces come to Cutlers Court for help.
Video.title: Wallace vs Wallace

Video.summary: A woman accuses her boyfriend of being an inconvenience and a drunk, but a shocking reveal could turn the whole case on its head.
Video.title: Braddy vs. Scott

Video.summary: The Cutlers navigate a messy situationship when Ricardo brings Errollyn to court for a paternity test.
Video.title: Clarke vs. Smith

Video.summary: Perrion and Steven didn't last as a couple but hope to make it as business partners; it may be time for a drug test.
Video.title: Roberts vs. Powell

Video.summary: Jamal says he's suing jealous ex-girlfriend for trying to run him over after accusing him of cheating on her.
Video.title: Breakup Demolition Derby

Video.summary: Jonathan claims he purchased what he thought was a new iPhone 6 from the defendant, Travis, and soon discovered the phone was stolen and black listed. When he confronted the defendant the guy basically told him to bug off. Travis says he bought the phone from someone else, gave Jonathan his contact info and told him his beef was with the other guy, not him. He’s accused of being phony.
Video.title: Being Phony

Video.summary: Wendy Cooper sues her neighbor Melanie Carducci for $4,975, claiming harassment and psychological harm. Wendy says Melanie harassed her and her dog, while Melanie counters that Wendy caused constant conflict, even filming through her windows.
Video.title: Neighbor Nightmare

Video.summary: Liatwanne petitions the court for rehab for her son, saying he's an addict who started using drugs as a teen.
Video.title: Running with the Wrong Crowd

Video.summary: A woman claims she promoted the defendant's cosmetic line on social media but never got paid; the defendant says the plaintiff dragged his name and his products through the mud.
Video.title: Likes for Lipstick

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that after her 9-year-old son passed away, she became addicted to heroin but has been clean for 30 years; she is suing her former friend for repayment of a loan, while the ex-friend denies owing her for anything.
Video.title: Past Bonds and Present Debts

Video.summary: Forty-six-year-old Jennifer Lozada is suing her husband and his mistress for alienation of affection.
Video.title: Alienated Whistleblower

Video.summary: Guadalupe is suing Thomas, the owner of a Quinceanera dress shop, for pain and suffering, and the dress.
Video.title: Franken-dress

Video.summary: Gabriella is suing her former employer for $600,000 for mental anguish and wrongful termination.
Video.title: Anniversary Blowout

Video.summary: Damien sues Sal for $35 million, alleging Sal's car service ruined his marrage by dropping his wife at his mistress' house. Sal denies fault, prioritizing business growth.
Video.title: Car Service Scandals

Video.summary: Samantha sues Elizabeth and PI Ricardo for $40,000 over false accusations. Elizabeth hired Ricardo to investigate Samantha's husband but wrongly accused Samantha. Samantha claims harassment, and defamation. Elizabeth and Ricardo deny responsibility.
Video.title: Shadows of Doubt

Video.summary: Mindy Santez sues Roy Franklin for $2M over Timmy's ruined Olympic career due to Roy's drunken scooter incident at a July 4th festival. Mindy claims Roy's ongoing violations led to harassment. Roy cites alleged targeting, like cat removal.
Video.title: Rascal Roy & HOA Nightmare

Video.summary: Mario is suing the neighborhood psychic, Lydia, after promising to remove his curse...for a fee.
Video.title: Psychic promises

Video.summary: Wilbur and his wife are suing his sister, Jennifer, after their son was left out of their grandmother's will.
Video.title: Will-fully Repugnant

Video.summary: Michelle is suing Michael and Nuri for negligence and business loss after her high-end spa was damaged.
Video.title: Piglet Parade

Video.summary: Michael Brown sues Victor Hernandez, "Savage Skin" tattoo shop owner, for $50,000, alleging Victor maliciously altered his tattoo design due to a grudge over dating Victor's ex, causing an embarrassing tattoo. Victor says it's a misunderstanding.
Video.title: Ink Is Best Served Cold

Video.summary: Annie sues ex-best friend Olivia for $150K emotional distress. Olivia, once maid of honor, hijacked wedding plans, changing venue and dresses. Annie feels betrayed, removed Olivia from bridal party. Olivia defends, says she improved wedding.
Video.title: Nuptial Nemesis

Video.summary: Maddy sues Vanessa for theft and emotional distress, seeking $300,000. Their IVF journey soured due to suspicions of cheating and missing money. Vanessa claims shared IVF funds; Maddy discovered an affair with Tyler, a mutual friend.
Video.title: Conception, Deception

Video.summary: Giselle is suing her father for Emotional Distress and $145,000 for the cost of canceling her wedding.
Video.title: Daddy Dearest

Video.summary: Miguel is suing his ex-girlfriend for the entire $5 million which she won via a scratch-off ticket.
Video.title: Tickets to lies

Video.summary: Evelyn sues Dexter for $500K, saying he tricked her into leaving her marriage, causing financial ruin and distress. Dexter denies, saying she pursued him as a gold digger.
Video.title: For Love or Money
